details.title: do;MIN(0)
details.description:
Start with a deck of just few simple cards and proceed to use it to beat stages by placing the cards on the field so that the pips connect. After each beaten stage you can not only pick a new additional card to add to your deck but also one of the presented special code injections that affect how the game will play out.
You can then continue going on until you can't beat the par score of the stage anymore. How high can you climb on the online leaderboards?
Made for GitHub Game Off 2021 during November 2021 using the following tools:
- Unity 2021.1- Inkscape- krita- Garage Band- Audacity

game.title: BENDYWORM
game.short_text: A platformer where the entire world bends like a worm

details.title: BENDYWORM
details.description:
BENDYWORM is a platformer with a twist: the entire world bends and twists around you as your progress through the level. Why? Because you're inside of a gigantic worm, and worms are bendy.
The game is made for Github Game Off 2021.

Controls
(note - only keyboard input prompts are shown in game; gamepad button prompts are missing but they still work)



Keyboard
Gamepad
Action




Arrow keys
Left Stick or DPad
Move


Z or Space
A (XBox) / B (Nintendo)
Jump (hold to jump higher)


X
X (Xbox) / Y (Nintendo)
Shoot (hold to charge beam)


Enter or Space
A (XBox) / B (Nintendo)
Accept/Continue


Escape
START
Open pause menu




Source code
The source code is available here: https://github.com/Bauxitedev/bendyworm

Soundtrack
The soundtrack is available here:
https://bandcamp.com/EmbeddedPlayer/album=3250622351/size=large/bgcol=ffffff/linkcol=0687f5/artwork=small/transparent=true/

FAQ
I want to run the game in windowed mode, not in fullscreen. How?
Press [ESC] to open the pause menu, then toggle "Fullscreen" to run the game in windowed mode.
The game runs slowly. What to do?
In the main game, press [ESC] to open the pause menu. Then uncheck "Fullscreen" to run the game in windowed mode, and reduce the size of the window. This makes the game run at a lower resolution, which should increase performance on lower-end GPUs.
Alternatively, if you want to play the game in fullscreen mode anyway, you can reduce your desktop resolution by right clicking the desktop and selecting "Display Settings" (e.g. if you're on a 1080p screen, you can drop down the resolution to 720p and it should run much faster)
I beat the game and I want to replay it. How?
After watching the credits, enter the main game again, press [ESC] to open the pause menu, and then select "Delete Save and Start Over".

Known issues

Gamepad input prompts are missing, only keyboard input prompts are shown (see above for gamepad controls)


Donate
If you like the game, consider buying the game or buying me a coffee:

Additionally, you may enjoy my previous game, Meteorite, as well.

License
MIT for the code, CC BY 3.0 for the assets. (attribute to Bauxitedev or one of the authors below, depending on assets used)
Attribution:

Brain 3D model by kpaulsen (CC BY 3.0)
Godot Pixel Logo based on the work by herrwoland (CC0)
Keyboard icons based on the work by TRBRY (CC BY 3.0)
Some sounds used from Kenney's Retro Sound Pack (CC0)

game.title: Hivemind
game.short_text: Help Bugatti connect again to HIVEMIND.

details.title: Hivemind
details.description:
HIVEMIND
We end up in the third position in the Github Game Off 2021 (first in Graphics and Theme interpretation). Thank you for your support!Source code: https://github.com/raformatico/HivemindBeing an insect wasn't bad.
I lived day to day with my comrades, all for one and one for all.
  
But evolution was capricious and decided to play with me.
  
I evolved, losing the connection with the HIVEMIND. Now, I can't understand the rest of the insects. They can't understand me either. Although with a lot of concentration i can connect with them at a basic level.
I hope to collect enough lymph to make a decent offering to "Mother Bug"...
... Only she can undo my curse and connect me back to HIVEMIND.
Please, Mother Bug... hear my prayers!
'○.○'
Discover this world, help "Bugatti" to explore and find enough yellow balls "lymph" and climb to the sacred portal in Mother Bug's mountain to complete the adventure!
Mouse & Keyboard:  w/a/s/d (move) ·  w/a/s/d + shift (run) ·  spacebar (jump) · LMB (fly) · RMB (connect) · mouselook (free view) · RMB + mouselook (interact).
Gamepad:  L stick button (move) · L stick button + RT (run) · A (jump) · X (fly) · RB (connect) · RSB (free view) · RB + RSB (interact).
We are a Spanish team and this is our submission for Game Off 2021. Hope you like it!!

details.title: Bumblebee Blitz
details.description:
About
Two teams of bumblebees have arrived to compete in the Bumblebee Blitz competition! Collect nectar from flowers to help lead your team to victory!
Very loosely inspired by a certain wizard sport.
Gameplay
Collect nectar from yellow flowers and carry it back to your hive to earn 10 pointsCarrying the nectar makes you slow, so pass it to allies when possibleBump into bees from the enemy team to force them to drop the nectarUse the red nectar to shoot at other beesWatch out for the purple super flowers! The first team to collect it gains 25 pointsLook out for ladybugs as well, catching one earns your team 3 points
Controls
Mouse/Keyboard:Left-click to move toward mouseHold and release right-click to use ability (boost, pass, shoot)Esc to open game menuEnter to chat
Controller:Left stick to moveHold and release A/X button to use ability (boost, pass, shoot)
Touch screen: (works but isn't great)Hold touch to move toward fingerDouble tap and hold to use ability
Notes
This game has multiplayer. Hopefully it's working, but if the server is down you can still play offline. The netcode isn't really well optimized so it can be a bit laggy, and I'm sure it's full of plenty of bugs. Still, it seems to at least work!

game.title: Bugged Out
game.short_text: A Retro Adventure Inspired by Megaman & Gunstar Heroes

details.title: Bugged Out
details.description:
A Retro 2d side-scroller Adventure Inspired by Megaman & Gunstar Heroes

A loveletter to 90s and 80's gaming
Pete the Pest Exterminator is Shrunk to the size of a bug by Mad Scientist Dr Dronenburg. Jump, Blast and dodge your way through 3 levels and 3 bosses as you conquer Dronenburg’s mansion in this bitesize, side scrolling retro adventure with gameplay inspired by 80’s & 90’s videogames such as Megaman, Contra and Gunstar Heroes. 

(This game was made from scratch in 3 weeks for the 2021 Git hub game off)

Controls :

Move Right =  D 
 Move Left   =  A

Jump =               W

Shoot (In facing direction) = SPACEBAR


Levels :

Garden
Slugworth (Boss)
Kitchen
B0tfly (Boss)
Bedroom / Attic
Dr Dronenburg (Boss)

*The music in the game is minimal  to simulate the feeling of playing oldchool consoles like Atari, with the only sounds being the haunting simple retro sound effects which give us all that warm familiar feeling of nostalgia.

This is our first ever game jam ( Started 1 week late) and first finished game created with the Unity engine. 

I (@Charlesthedev) created the Art, Game Design and programming
My brother (@Bhamjo) Created the narrative & dialogue. we did all of this in under 3 weeks.
You can download the soundtrack we used for free - check out the mega talented Deviruchi:
https://xdeviruchi.itch.io/8-bit-fantasy-adventure-music-pack
Here is the link to the GITHUB depository :
https://github.com/Charlesthed3v/Bugoutgamejam
* Web version is scheduled to be available within the next week due to technical difficulties.

game.title: FAD
game.short_text: Ears only

details.title: FAD
details.description:
Q: How good are your ears?
FAD is an audio 👂-only game in which you're guided through an underwater maze by a mysterious radio contact 📻.
Interrupting a routine dive, your submarine has just caught a massive electromagnetic pulse, knocking out all the cameras. You have only the most primitive technology on the boat and a mysterious radio contact called Marsha to guide you. How far can you get using just your ears to navigate? And who is Marsha?
What people aren't saying about this game:

The game no one was looking for!
My screen is blank, 1 star.
A real ear-opener!
I don't know what they see in this game.
The only fad that was never popular.
Hmm... I don't like the sound of that.

Note
This is my submission for GitHub Game Off 2021, and in that spirit here is the code. It is somewhat of a crazy experiment, but hope there's some fun hiding in there somewhere. Enjoy (the game, probably not the code)!

game.title: memoria castaway
game.short_text: fish up your memories or forget it all

details.title: memoria castaway
details.description:
The ocean spans endlessly around my listless body and swallows the vast sky, threatening to swallow me too. It laps away at my consciousness, until I melt away into its embrace. Time stretches and expands, and I can’t tell if it’s been minutes or days or months. I can't remember anything.
    
Memoria Castaway is a point-and-click visual novel with fishing minigames. Follow our protagonist as they fish their way through their memories and, for better or worse, remember why they forgot them in the first place.
Controls: Click, Space, or Enter to interact.
Created for Game Off 2021. This game may not seem like it follows the theme but I swear it will become more clear in the future. Or maybe, you've simply forgotten how it relates...
This is a prototype, and is not the whole game. Stay tuned for when we release the completed game! Please don't yell at us for bugs, they were intentionally added to make this prototype still meet the game jam's theme and also this was made in under a month.
Known bugs: It's possible to get stuck on the fishing stage, due to fish no longer noticing the bob. If this happens, please use the skip button to skip past the fishing stage.
Credits
Game programming, background / character art, SFX by Froggo (shuttlefrog @ itch / twitter)
Narrative writing, concept / level / character design, UI programming by Kain (ethverie @ itch / twitter)
Open source music by: MusMus, TAM Music, Purrple Cat

Caught in a sudden downpour and washed away, Oshi - the brave young explorer must now find her way home through and adventure through the world she's never seen.

**Update**
With the nature of the Jam, the 2 new files do not contain changes/fixes! We want the game to be presented as it was when the Jam ended! The only change is however an uploaded Mac version and a level-select page so users can skip levels if they wish!

game.title: trapped
game.short_text: A survival game about a fly trying to survive after mysteriously being sucked into a phone

details.title: trapped
details.description:
Created for the #GitHubGameOff 2021. A survival game about a fly trying to survive after mysteriously being sucked into a phone. Tilt your phone to move the fly around to avoid colliding with the various shapes on screen.
This game features a minimalistic atmosphere and artwork, combined with originally composed/performed music. Built using HTML, CSS, and JS on top of the p5.js framework, as well as some p5.js plugins. Check out the source code if that tickles your fancy.
If you like the music, check out the soundtrack!





This game is designed to be played on a mobile device, and requires permission to use it's motion sensors. Because of how Itch embeds work, some mobile devices (such as iPhones) are unable to grant access. To work around this limitation, this game is hosted on GitHub Pages: https://starzonmyarmz.github.io/trapped/.

moreInfo.Author: starzonmyarmz
moreInfo.Tags: GitHub, mobile, p5js

Flies are on their way to spoil the freshly baked pie. Luckily, the baker has planted some venus flytraps to guard his prize. Devour the flies before they ruin the pie!

details.title: Bugnic
details.description:
BUGNIC
https://github.com/patrickbard/bugnic
You and your miss go out to a picnic, but lots of bugs got in your way.
As a fancy frog that you are, you do not want to get your hands dirty so you use a flyswatter.

During game play, use ESC/SPACE to pause.
Use your mouse to control the flyswatter and left click to strike a hit.
Take notice that there is a slight delay between clicking and actually hitting your targets... and you can use that in your advantage.
Try to kill as many bugs as you can before too many of them got out of your view.
LICENSING:Mike Franklyn songs provided by Epidemic Sounds

game.title: Feature
game.short_text: It's not a bug. A puzzle platformer about causing bugs... um, features.

details.title: Feature
details.description:
It's not a bug. A puzzle platformer about messing up code.
In this puzzle platformer, you'll jump your way through levels, messing with the code of the game to create bugs features that allow you to make it to the end of the level. Slamming on parts of the code that are exposed through the protective mesh allow you to change the code of the game itself.
This game was created during the 2021 GitHub Game Off as an interpretation of this years theme: Bug! This was a family effort between father and sons (12 and 14) where the kids did most of the work and the father played a supporting role in our first game jam. After the game jam is over, we'll add way more levels and new pieces of code to manipulate to create more bugs features.
For transparency for the game jam reviewers: we uploaded the web version of the game after the submission deadline, but we haven't made any changes to the game in that time - just added web/HTML5 as a option so you can try it in your browser without installing.

moreInfo.Author: Mama Goblin Games
moreInfo.Tags: 2D, GitHub, My First Game Jam, Puzzle-Platformer

game.title: Bugs On The Meadow
game.short_text: Be a bee, collect pollen & save some flowers.

details.title: Bugs On The Meadow
details.description:
You play a small bee on a small, flowered meadow. Just fly from flower to flower, collect pollen, seed new flowers - life could be just honey for you. 
If only there wasn't this one bug who started eating your beloved flowers. And damn, it even gets children...
To collect pollen, fly to a flower and hit and hold space (it gets stucked sometimes, just try again or try another flower). Planting a seed with right click costs 30 pollen. Gameover when there are no flowers left on the little meadow. Play it right here in the browser or download the zip, unpack it and fire the .exe ! :-)

moreInfo.Author: alexvwegen
moreInfo.Tags: Atmospheric, nature, Short

game.title: Decomposer
game.short_text: A music creation game with a pesky twist

details.title: Decomposer
details.description:
Decomposer
A music creation game where pesky bugs will try to ruin your composition. Bump into them to shoo them away.
You can save up to two songs to your local storage and load them later for playback.

The game is built with Phaser 3.Player controls:W / Up - jumpA / Left - move leftD / Right - move right
Note controls:Click - place or remove note in range
Playback shortcuts:Space - play/pauseZ - go to beginningX - seek backwardC - seek forward
Share you music with others in the comment

Hacks incoming... :)Get your song dataYou can get retrieve the data for the song by opening the browser developer tools  (right click on the page + `Inspect`) and navigating to:`Application > Local Storage` (Chrome)`Storage > Local Storage` (Firefox) and clicking the url that is NOT christopherbot.itch.io. In here, look for `decomposer_game_save_1` or `decomposer_game_save_2` and copy the Value.
Paste this into a comment for others to copy.To play someone else's song, copy their Value. It should look something like this:[{"x":155,"y":505},{"x":205,"y":470},{"x":255,"y":435},{"x":305,"y":382.5}]Make sure the game is started and then in the browser developer tools, navigate to:`Application > Local Storage` (Chrome)`Storage > Local Storage` (Firefox)and click on the url that is NOT christopherbot.itch.io.Enter a new Key Value pair with the following:Key: decomposer_game_save_1 (or decomposer_game_save_1)Value: <the_copied_value>
You will be able to load the respective slot and playback the song.
Happy composing!

moreInfo.Author: christopherbot
moreInfo.Tags: 2D, bug, keyboard, mouse, mushroom, Music, Music Production, phaser3, piano

game.title: SYNTHESIA=NOX
game.short_text: Do not spare the corruption.

details.title: SYNTHESIA=NOX
details.description:
:: Controls ::
WASD - movement
Mouse - aim
Spacebar - shoot
LMB - view entity source code
:: HELP ::
- Avoid the hail of enemy bullets as you proceed to confront the source of the corruption plaguing Selene's mind.
- Hack your foes! Click on an enemy to view its source code, and then modify it in the editor on the right-hand side of the screen. Your changes will be directly injected into the enemy and modify their behavior. Javascript is still the language of choice in year 22xx.
:: CREDITS ::
ProgrammingIncluded || Software Architect, Art Designer, Illustrator
hirudan || Software Developer
cantataku || Music Composer, SFX Designer
Teller Romantique || Title Designer
:: STORY ::
After the events of LUNAR=N0X, a battered ChronoSlip probe delivered the scavenged carcass and consciousness of the synthetic humanoid prognostication entity, the all-driver SELENE, to a secret research station orbiting a moon of Planet 1423. Within its stygian depths, a lone scientist scrambles against time to curb the corruption spreading in the rapidly fragmenting mind of the all-driver so that her wisdom can again guide the Mandate.
Hack the consciousness of an artificial omnipotence. Do not spare the corruption. Selene must survive.

moreInfo.Tags: Hacking, Sci-fi, Synthwave, Twin Stick Shooter

game.title: Squorm
game.short_text: A Study in Movement

details.title: Squorm
details.description:
This is my submission to the  Github Game Off 2021 (Theme: Bug)
Source: https://github.com/MrBundles/Game_Off_2021_Bug
A Study in Worm-Like Movement in a Minimalistic Art Style

Note: Please see known issues below, and let me know if you find any other game-breaking bugs while you play.

- Controls -
Mouse - The Sqworm will move towards anywhere you click (don't drag)

- Use of Theme -

The player controls a worm-like character.

- Known Issues -

-Switches will sometimes stop working if pulled several times in quick succession. This issue can be resolved by resetting the level.
-Sqworm can occasionally get stuck in certain positions. This issue can be resolved by resetting the level.

- Updates -
Rev 1.3 resolved the following issues
- Completing a level does not unlock it on the level select screen. As a result the player could not revisit levels to play them again.

moreInfo.Rating: Rated 5.0 out of 5 stars(1 total ratings)
moreInfo.Author: MrBundles
moreInfo.Tags: GitHub, Godot, Physics, Puzzle-Platformer, worm
